Suryakumar Yadav Faces Ultimatum After Shubman Gill Omission

Dec 21, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Suryakumar Yadav Under Pressure After Gill’s Exclusion

India’s T20 World Cup 2026 squad announcement has exposed a stricter selection philosophy, with Shubman Gill’s omission triggering deeper scrutiny of leadership and form, including captain Suryakumar Yadav.
